title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 56.775 - Severability of provisions
text:
56.775.  Severability of provisions. — The provisions of sections 56.750 to 56.775 are severable.  If any part of sections 56.750 to 56.775 is declared invalid or unconstitutional, it is the intent of the legislature that the remaining portions of sections 56.750 to 56.775 shall remain and be in full force and effect.
(L. 1981 S.B. 32 § 6)
